- No obvious AI-generation artifacts (warped text, inconsistent UI geometry, impossible shadows) are visible; fonts, alignment, and interface elements look coherent.
- Main takeaway: it looks like an authentic screenshot/graphic that has been edited for layout and privacy (blurring), not a photorealistic scene, and no clear synthetic-generation cues are present.
